question: What are the specific conditions and timeline under which Adams Golf can terminate the endorsement agreement with Tom Watson for cause?
ollama_answer: According to paragraph 23 of the Endorsement Agreement, Adams Golf can terminate the agreement for cause upon giving written notice of fifteen (15) days to Tom Watson if either party commits a material breach of this Agreement. The breach must not be rectified within the fifteen-day period. Upon termination, Tom Watson will be required to repay Adams Golf for the unperformed period of the Agreement, calculated in the same way as repayment is calculated under paragraph 8A.
